mode.hint.smart: Finds the signature spot in each document
docs.title: Documents
docs.empty.title: Start a stack
docs.empty.body: Drop PDF files anywhere in this window, or click Add PDFs. Sign the top one — every document underneath gets the same signature.
stage.noSignature: Create a signature, then drag it into place
stage.smartFound: Smart detect proposed this spot — drag to correct this document
stage.smartNone: Nothing detected in this document — drag a spot manually
stage.dropHint: Drop PDFs to add them to the stack
sig.title: Signatures
sig.empty: No signatures yet — create your first one.
placement.title: Placement
placement.appliesAll: Applied to every document in the stack.
placement.smartNote: Each document gets its own detected spot. Drag on the preview to correct just this one.
studio.title: New signature
studio.name: Name
studio.draw.hint: Sign below with your mouse, trackpad or pen
studio.photo.drop: or drop a photo of your signature on paper
edit.retypeHint: Click any text in the document to cover it and retype
wm.note: Applied to every page when you save. Use the whiteout tool to cover a watermark that was already in the file.
merge.title: Merge documents
merge.hint: Pick documents and their order. The merged PDF is added to the list as a new document.
edit.eyedropScreen: Pick a color from the screen
edit.eyedropPage: Pick a color from the document — then click the page
sig.placeArmed: Click where the signature should go — Esc to cancel
sig.linkedHint: A placed signature is selected — click a signature above to use it there.
action.printHint: Prints with the current signatures and edits — nothing is saved
sig.clickToPlace: Click on the page to place the selected signature
sig.removeAllBody: This removes it from all {{count}} documents in the stack.
sig.rotate: Drag to rotate — double-click to reset
stage.encrypted: Password-protected PDF — the saved copy will not keep its protection
edit.shapingWarn: This script may not render correctly in the saved PDF — glyph shaping is not supported yet.
edit.ocr.auto: Text recognition (OCR): automatic on scanned pages — click to force on
edit.ocr.on: Text recognition (OCR): on for all pages — click to turn off
edit.ocr.off: Text recognition (OCR): off — click for automatic
edit.retypeHintOcr: Click any text in the document to cover it and retype — reading scanned text is on
error.openFailed: Could not open "{{name}}" — try picking it again
error.protectedEdit: This PDF is password-protected and cannot be rebuilt — remove its password first, then try again
